2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

BUDT741 Digital Health (2 Credits)

Healthcare is perhaps the latest industry to use technology to innovate and automate its business processes. The focus of the course is to provide a deep understanding to the current and emerging technologies in the healthcare industry. The course will also discuss the vagaries of healthcare data and the analytics techniques that are specific to the healthcare industry.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith.

Credit Only Granted for. BUDT758M or BUDT741.
